project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion
verification_instructions: Run pnpm lint then pnpm build from the frontend directory. Both must pass with no errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node 22, pnpm available.
contribution_requirements: No pixel fonts inside the app. Both dark and light mode must work (use dark: overrides). Commit all changes but do NOT push.
key_patterns: localStorage is used for data persistence (chronai-* keys). DnD uses @dnd-kit/core + @dnd-kit/sortable. Tasks board has 3 columns (todo, inprogress, done). TopBar z-index is z-[100] at h-14. OAuth connects via popup with postMessage or window focus refetch.
directory_structure: frontend/app/dashboard/ contains pages for analytics, tasks, settings, calendar, habits, planner. frontend/components/ contains shared UI and feature components. frontend/lib/ has API utilities.
